content.code: error C2679: binary << : no operator found which takes a right-hand operand of type Cents (or there is no acceptable conversion)
error C2676: binary += : Cents does not define this operator or a conversion to a type acceptable to the predefined operator

content.text: Finally, our code will compile and run! Here is the result:11 centsNote that we didn’t have to modifyaverage()at all to make it work with objects of typeCents. We simply had to define the operators used to implementaverage()for theCentsclass, and the compiler took care of the rest!Next lesson21.xChapter 21 summary and quizBack to table of contentsPrevious lesson21.13Shallow vs. deep copying
